$comment: Grimoire recipe targets for Harmony. W1 OWNS this file and seeds the base targets; later items only ADD targets (append a key), never edit an existing one — the integration master merges by key. Each target maps a stable name to the concrete project command (see CLAUDE.md Project commands).

build.description: Build the web bundle (CI-safe; full DMG build is `pnpm tauri build`).

server.description: Run the Tauri dev shell (headful; not CI-safe).

test.description: Run frontend (vitest) and backend (cargo) unit tests.

lint.command: pnpm lint && cargo clippy --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml -- -D warnings

smoke.description: CI-safe smoke (W18; hardened in v0.2 Sight): build the web bundle, cargo-check the Rust shell, then run the headless visual-inspection capture which VERIFIES the GUI actually mounts and renders on every route (Library/Cores/Search/Settings) with mock IPC, failing on a blank or crashed UI or any uncaught page error — not merely asserting a file exists. No GUI window, no RetroArch, no network.
smoke.command: pnpm build && cargo check --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml && node scripts/visual-inspect.mjs

inspect.description: Visual-inspection CLI (gui-visual-inspection-cli; W18, upgraded v0.2 Sight): render the built web UI headlessly with mock Tauri IPC, walk every primary route, screenshot each to artifacts/visual-inspection/, capture console + uncaught errors, and assert each route's React tree mounted (exit 1 on a blank/crashed GUI). Run `pnpm build` first; falls back to a static DOM dump (GUI unverified, exit 0) when no headless browser is available.

sync-deps.description: Resolve and vendor Grimoire-channel dependencies declared in vendor.toml (dependency-channel feature). Verifies SHA256 before placement, writes vendor.lock.

vendor-check.description: Offline conformance check: recomputes tree_sha256 for each vendored dep and compares to vendor.lock. Warn-only gate (exits 0 but prints findings).
